tool_name: Sheet Metal Press Brake Bending — Bending Force, Springback Angle & Minimum Bend Radius

inputs.name: Bend Line Length (L) — into page
inputs.note: Length of the press brake punch; equals workpiece width perpendicular to bend direction

inputs.name: V-Die Opening Width (V)
inputs.note: Rule of thumb: V = 8 × t for mild steel; V = 6 × t for aluminium; larger V = lower force, more springback

inputs.name: Material Ultimate Tensile Strength (R_m)
inputs.note: Mild steel DC01: Rm=270–370 MPa; S355: Rm=470–630 MPa; SS304: Rm=515–720 MPa; Al5052: Rm=230 MPa
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

inputs.name: Material Yield Strength (R_e / R_p0.2)
inputs.note: Springback depends on R_e/E ratio — high-strength materials spring back more
inputs.uncertainty_source: JCSS PMC Part 3 §25.2 Table 25.1 — Yield/ultimate strength (steel): CoV=0.07

inputs.name: Required Final (After Springback) Bend Angle (θ_final)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 Table 3 — Angular tolerance class 'm': ±0°20' for >50mm side

inputs.name: Punch Nose Radius (r_p)
inputs.note: Minimum radius ≥ material thickness for most materials; sharp punches cause cracking

formulas: F_bend_kn = 1.33 * Rm_mpa * Math.pow(material_thickness_mm, 2) * bend_length_mm / (die_opening_mm * 1000)  // [kN] — Bending Force — Air Bending (Wiping / V-Die) — Ref: Air bending: F = 1.33·R_m·t²·L/V — DIN 6935 / SME Sheet Metal Handbook §14.2; factor 1.33 for 90° V-bending

E_mpa = 210000; elongation_pct = Math.max(5, (1 - Fy_mpa/Rm_mpa) * 60); r_min_mm = material_thickness_mm * (50 / elongation_pct - 1)  // [mm] — Minimum Bend Radius (r_min) to Avoid Cracking — Ref: r_min = t(50/A−1) — SME §14.3; A=elongation% from Rm/Re ratio; ISO 7438 §7.3 bend test criterion

r_neutral_mm = punch_radius_mm + material_thickness_mm / 2; springback_factor = 1 - Fy_mpa * r_neutral_mm / (E_mpa * material_thickness_mm); Theta_punch_deg = bend_angle_deg / springback_factor; delta_theta_deg = Theta_punch_deg - bend_angle_deg  // [°] — Springback Angle (Δθ) — Simplified Analytical — Ref: Springback: θ_punch/θ_final = 1/(1 − 3·R_e·r/(E·t)) — Hosford & Caddell §7; simplified elastic recovery

k_factor = (punch_radius_mm < 2 * material_thickness_mm) ? 0.33 : 0.41; BA_mm = (punch_radius_mm + k_factor * material_thickness_mm) * bend_angle_deg * Math.PI / 180  // [mm] — Flat Blank Length — Bend Allowance (BA) — Ref: BA = (r_p + K·t)·θ_rad — SME / Machinery's Handbook 32nd Ed.; K-factor: 0.33 (tight), 0.41 (standard), 0.50 (loose)

F_bottom_kn = F_bend_kn * 3  // [kN] — Punch Bottoming Force (for coining / bottom bending) — Ref: Bottom bending: F_bottom ≈ 3 × F_air_bending — SME §14.4; coining eliminates springback but requires 5–10× air-bending force

F_required_kn = F_bend_kn * 1.15; tonnage_kn = F_required_kn  // [kN (÷ 9.81 = tonnes-force)] — Press Brake Tonnage Required with Safety Factor — Ref: 15% safety factor on calculated bending force; select press brake rated ≥ F_required; 1 tonne-force = 9.81 kN

rules.message: Punch radius < minimum bend radius: cracking risk on outer surface — increase punch radius to r_min or pre-heat material; verify with trial bends
Die opening < 6t: excessive bending force and tool wear — minimum V = 6t for aluminium, 8t for mild steel; smaller die opening risks sheet damage and machine overload
Required bending force > 1000 tonnes: very heavy press brake needed — verify material and geometry; consider multi-pass incremental bending or rolling for thick plates

smart_warnings.message: Springback > 10°: significant overbend required — for high-strength steel and AHSS, springback can reach 15–25°; consider bottom bending or laser tracking closed-loop angle control on CNC press brake
High-strength material with large r_min: difficult-to-form sheet — consider hot-forming, pre-annealing, or laser scoring at bend line for UHSS > 700 MPa
Long bend + high force: press brake deflection significant — ram crowning compensation mandatory; deflection without crowning causes trapezoidal bends on long parts
Die opening > 16t: excessive — large V-opening reduces bending accuracy and increases springback; use V = 8–10t for best accuracy-to-force balance on structural steel
Large punch radius with shallow angle: wipe bending geometry — verify punch stroke and die sizing prevent material slip; consider pre-positioning stops

fmea.effect: Punch radius < minimum bend radius: cracking risk on outer surface — increase punch radius to r_min or pre-heat material; verify with trial bends
Die opening < 6t: excessive bending force and tool wear — minimum V = 6t for aluminium, 8t for mild steel; smaller die opening risks sheet damage and machine overload
Required bending force > 1000 tonnes: very heavy press brake needed — verify material and geometry; consider multi-pass incremental bending or rolling for thick plates

fmea.failureMode: Springback > 10°: significant overbend required — for high-strength steel and AHSS, springback can reach 15–25°; consider bottom bending or laser tracking closed-loop angle control on CNC press brake
High-strength material with large r_min: difficult-to-form sheet — consider hot-forming, pre-annealing, or laser scoring at bend line for UHSS > 700 MPa
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Fy_mpa > 500 && r_min_mm > 3 * material_thickness_mm

fmea.failureMode: Long bend + high force: press brake deflection significant — ram crowning compensation mandatory; deflection without crowning causes trapezoidal bends on long parts
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: bend_length_mm > 3000 && F_required_kn > 2000

fmea.failureMode: Die opening > 16t: excessive — large V-opening reduces bending accuracy and increases springback; use V = 8–10t for best accuracy-to-force balance on structural steel
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: die_opening_mm > 16 * material_thickness_mm

fmea.failureMode: Large punch radius with shallow angle: wipe bending geometry — verify punch stroke and die sizing prevent material slip; consider pre-positioning stops
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: punch_radius_mm > material_thickness_mm * 3 && bend_angle_deg < 30
